zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere於1202年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德巴頓時，她的父親Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred44歲，母親Helewise de Lancaster33歲。她和William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1247年之前在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere于1202年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德巴頓时，她的父亲Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred44岁，母亲Helewise de Lancaster33岁。她和William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1247年之前在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lancaster,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lancaster in northwestern England, which is recorded as Loncastre in 1086. The place takes its name from the river Lune + Old English ceaster ‘city, Roman fortification’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’). The river name is probably British, perhaps related to Gaelic slán ‘healthy’, ‘salubrious’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

The Mongolian Tatars devastated the country. Their presence, which lasted a year, halted development for at least a century. After the warfare with the Hungarians, the Tatars did not continue towards the west.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere was born in 1202, in Barton, Westmorland, England, her father, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, was 44 and her mother, Helewise de Lancaster, was 33. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. She died before 1247, in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere est née en 1202, à Barton, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Lancaster, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. Elle est décédée avant 1247, à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere 1202 in Barton, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred 44 und ihre Mutter Helewise de Lancaster 33. Sie hatte mit William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1247 in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere è nata il nel 1202 nel Barton, Westmorland, England, sua padre, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Helewise de Lancaster, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. Morì prima del 1247, nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice de Lancaster, of Windermereが1202年にイギリスウエストモーランドバートンで生まれた時，父Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfredは44歳，母Helewise de Lancasterは33歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Lindsay Lord of Luffnessとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1247年以前にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere(이)가 1202년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise de Lancaster(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1247년 이전 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere nasceu em 1202, em Barton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Lancaster, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. Ela faleceu antes 1247, em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere родилась в 1202 г. в местности бартон, вестморланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Lancaster, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. Она умерла перед 1247 г. в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere nació en 1202, en Barton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert FitzRoger FitzReinfred, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Helewise de Lancaster, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness. Murió antes de 1247, en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.
